summary: Iteration 14: i18n System & Total Pieces System Feature Testing Complete. All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend i18n toggle working on Dashboard. Total Pieces in System displayed in CapacityPlanModal, GanttView, and ProductionScreen.

issues: No language toggle on landing page - user cannot switch language until logged into Dashboard. Landing page uses localStorage preference but has no way to change it.

BACKEND: GET /api/gantt-data returns total_pieces_system field (32,260)
BACKEND: GET /api/gantt-data structure includes bars, pending, and total_pieces_system
BACKEND: GET /api/capacity-plan requires authentication (401 without token)
BACKEND: GET /api/capacity-plan returns total_pieces_system field (32,260)
BACKEND: GET /api/capacity-plan returns exactly 14 machines with required fields
BACKEND: total_pieces_system is consistent between both APIs (same value)
BACKEND: All machine load_status values are valid (idle/green/yellow/red)
BACKEND: GET /api/gantt-data accepts date filter parameters
FRONTEND: Landing page displays Spanish text by default (Control Total de Producción)
FRONTEND: Landing page hero, description, login button, feature cards use translation keys
FRONTEND: Dashboard language toggle (data-testid='lang-toggle-btn') works - switches ES↔EN
FRONTEND: Dashboard header buttons translated: Nueva Orden → New Order, Producción → Production
FRONTEND: Production Monitor button translated: Monitor de Producción → Production Monitor
FRONTEND: CapacityPlanModal title translated: Plan de Capacidad Productiva → Production Capacity Plan
FRONTEND: CapacityPlanModal shows Total Pieces in System card (data-testid='plan-total-pieces-system') with value 32,260
FRONTEND: CapacityPlanModal labels translated: Máquinas Activas → Active Machines, Total Producido → Total Produced, etc.
FRONTEND: CapacityPlanModal machine status translated: Sin actividad → No activity, Disponible → Available, Cargada → Loaded, Sobrecargada → Overloaded
FRONTEND: GanttView shows Total Pieces in System badge (data-testid='gantt-total-pieces-system') with value 32,260
FRONTEND: GanttView badge text translated: Total Piezas en Sistema → Total Pieces in System
FRONTEND: ProductionScreen shows Total Pieces in System in header (data-testid='prod-screen-total-pieces') with value 32,260
FRONTEND: ProductionScreen title translated: Monitor de Producción → Production Monitor
FRONTEND: Language preference persists in localStorage key 'app_language'
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add language toggle to landing page header so users can switch language before login

LanguageContext.js: LanguageProvider with t(), lang, toggleLang - localStorage persistence works
App.js: Landing page uses useLang() for translations but lacks toggle button in header

ProductionScreen.js: Shows total_pieces_system in header stats (data-testid='prod-screen-total-pieces')
server.py line 1350: gantt-data returns total_pieces_system calculated from all orders
server.py line 1439: capacity-plan returns total_pieces_system calculated from all orders

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All requested i18n and Total Pieces features verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n system fully verified. Language toggle on Dashboard works for ES↔EN. All three views (CapacityPlanModal, GanttView, ProductionScreen) display Total Pieces in System from backend API (32,260 pieces). Backend APIs /api/gantt-data and /api/capacity-plan both return total_pieces_system field consistently. Note: Landing page uses translations but has no language toggle - user must login to Dashboard to change language.
